title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TICULON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALITA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO TORIBIO LIMCAOCO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5156 / 62 OG No. 36, 6420 (September 5, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4404, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TICULON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALITA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO TORIBIO LIMCAOCO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Ticulon Elementary School in the Municipality of Malita, Province of Davao, is hereby changed to Toribio Limcaoco Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
